name: Philip Morris International Inc.
business: Philip Morris International Inc. sells cigarettes and smoke-free products, including heat-not-burn, nicotine pouch, and e-vapor products, to adult smokers and nicotine users in approximately 170 markets for cigarettes and 106 markets for smoke-free products. The company also has a wellness unit, Aspeya, focusing on oral consumer wellness offerings, including cannabinoid products.
sellsTo: consumers via e-commerce and brand retail

exposures.sentence: Our current product portfolio primarily consists of cigarettes and smoke-free products, including heat-not-burn, nicotine pouch and e-vapor products.
The business strategy of our wellness unit, Aspeya, currently focuses on developing and commercializing primarily oral consumer wellness offerings.

catalysts.event: Implementation of evolved organizational model with two primary business units: International and U.S.
catalysts.sentence: This change was implemented effective January 1, 2026, and as a result we realigned our reportable segments accordingly.

catalysts.event: Reporting of new reportable segments (International Smoke-Free, International Combustibles, and U.S.) begins
catalysts.sentence: As of the first quarter of 2026, our reporting will reflect these changes.

tamClaims.claim: Total international market (cigarettes and HTUs, excluding China and U.S.) was 2,587 billion units in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Total Market, billion units (excluding China and the U.S.) 2,587 2,596 2,560

tamClaims.claim: PMI's total international market share was 29.2% in 2025.
Total shipment volume (cigarettes and smoke-free products in equivalent units) was 786.5 billion units in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Total Shipment Volume (equivalent units in billions) 786.5 179.1 155.1 20.7 3.3 607.4
